title: June 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 6''' is the 157th day of the year (158th in leap years), with 208 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[David Dukes]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[John Byrne]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1963]] – [[Jason Isaacs]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 67|''Star Wars Weekly'' 67]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 51|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 51]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Daniel Logan]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War (TPB)|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' trade paperback]] published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 2|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 2]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Return (cinematic trailer)|''Return'']] trailer released.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids and Ewoks|''Omnibus: Droids and Ewoks'']] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Vivienne Chandler]] dies.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 49|''Star Wars'' (2015) 49]] published.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 3|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 3]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 11|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 11]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca Vol. 2 — The Crystal Run Part Two]]'' published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic: Path of Vengeance (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Path of Vengeance'' audiobook]] released.
<noinclude>
